title: Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
company: Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates:
Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates!
